Premed.Note: Granisetron 2 tbl p.o., Dexamatazon 16mg iv, Pantoprazol 40mg tbl p.o., Dithiaden 1 amp iv

Instructions.Name: gemcitabine
Instructions.Inst: v 500 ml FR i.v. počas 30 min

Instructions.Name: nab-paclitaxel
Instructions.Inst: v 500 ml FR i.v. počas 30 min po gemcitabíne
